refreshTokensBlock.title: Refresh tokens
refreshTokensBlock.helpText: Each time you log in, a refresh token is created, which is then used to generate short-lived access tokens.

logoutAll.success: You have successfully logged out from all devices.
logoutAll.error: Failed to log out from all devices.

logoutAllModal.title: Logging out from all devices
logoutAllModal.text: Are you sure you want to log out from all devices?

delete.success: You have successfully deleted your account.

deleteModal.title: Deleting the account
deleteModal.text: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
